message_templates.subject: Problem: {EVENT.NAME}

Severity: {{EVENT.SEVERITY}.htmlencode()}

message_templates.subject: Resolved in {EVENT.DURATION}: {EVENT.NAME}
message_templates.message:
Problem has been resolved at {{EVENT.RECOVERY.TIME}.htmlencode()} on {{EVENT.RECOVERY.DATE}.htmlencode()}
Problem name: {{EVENT.NAME}.htmlencode()}
Problem duration: {{EVENT.DURATION}.htmlencode()}
Host: {{HOST.NAME}.htmlencode()}
Severity: {{EVENT.SEVERITY}.htmlencode()}
Original problem ID: {{EVENT.ID}.htmlencode()}
{{TRIGGER.URL}.htmlencode()}
